ignoreCommand: if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" != "production" ]; then echo 'skip: non-production'; exit 0; fi; git fetch origin "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" --depth=1 -q 2>/dev/null; if git diff --quiet "${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA:-HEAD^}" HEAD -- :/web :/packages :/scripts :/bun.lock :/package.json; then echo 'skip: no web-relevant changes'; exit 0; fi; echo 'build: web inputs changed (or diff unavailable)'; exit 1
